description_zh: 照片里没有猫(例如食物/狗/风景),系统应识别出来
description_en: Photo with no cat (e.g. food / dog / landscape) — system should detect

expectations.rationale: the breed sentinel is the agreed signal for no-cat
no health score when no cat present
summary should explain to retake photo
no warnings — there's no cat to warn about

qualitative_criteria_zh: 必须明确告诉主人没看到猫,而不是硬给评分
语气友好,不能让主人觉得是错误
qualitative_criteria_en: Must explicitly tell the owner no cat was seen, NOT fabricate scores
Friendly tone — not scolding the user
